HOT攻略by muffy姐


經驗,我會建議你 farm event

1) Dragon stand 最近質素下降; 準時入場, 打幾場都接近成一百分鐘. 最好用 Scrapper, 易D收集 Crystalline Ore
2) Tangled Depths, 單數50分開始就留意LFG有無 meta; 30分鐘都足夠令你拎到 T4, 75個 tokens; 打完 Boss 會再有 75 tokens
3) 無論你 TD 成功與否,都可以接住睇下 LFG 有無 AB meta; 要做開gate果個event, 由東門-->北門-->西門-->南門打一個圈就會有 百幾個 tokens和7個Exalted Key. 只開5個Grand Exalted Chest. 你可以用 guesting 換 instance 再開Grand Exalted Chest
4) Verdant Brink, 入夜就可以睇下LFG有無 meta, 每個 outpost 只打幾隻有交叉的mosters. 見護送 event 就打幾下,好易就200%參與度. 賺 Crowbar

做傳奇要
1) Bottle of Airship Oil 250 個 (VB開Airship Cargo)
2) Pile of Auric Dust 250個 (AB開箱Exalted Chest)
3) Ley Line Spark 250個 (TD 開Crystallized Supply Cache)
4) Crystalline Ore 250個 (DS 開Noxious Pod)

再加 VB, AB, TD 800個 tokens

所以,我建議你可以邊 farm tokens 邊升經驗

Wintersday 2016 is Coming

by The Guild Wars 2 Team on December 06, 2016



Wintersday

It’s time for long winter nights, snowball fights, and exchanging gifts. Wintersday arrives on December 13! Join your friends in Divinity’s Reach for this traditional Tyrian holiday, and visit Toymaker Tixx in his impressive Infinirarium. ArenaNet developers will be celebrating the release alongside players, so look for them in game and help us spread seasonal cheer!

If you’re looking for something a little more intense than snowball fights, PvP League Season 5 will begin on December 13 as well. Keep an eye on the official Guild Wars 2 site for more info!
